title: pisum formosum
intro: Pisum formosum, also known as the garden pea or field pea, is a type of flowering legume plant that belongs to the Pisum genus. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pisum formosum include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
